title: JavaScript Fundamentals
description: Variables, datatypes, conversions, comparisons, strings, numbers, dates, memory and Temporal API concepts.

title: Arrays, Objects & JSON
description: JavaScript arrays, object handling, object methods and JSON fundamentals.

title: Functions & Scope
description: Functions, lexical scope, this keyword, arrow functions and IIFE concepts in JavaScript.

title: Execution Context & Call Stack
description: Understanding how JavaScript executes code, memory management, and call stack behavior.

title: Control Flow - If Else & Switch
description: Master conditional statements, logical operators, and switch cases in JavaScript.

title: Iterations & Loops
description: Master all types of loops in JavaScript - for, while, for...of, for...in, forEach and more.

title: Array Methods - filter, map & Chaining
description: Deep dive into filter(), map(), method chaining and functional array operations in JavaScript.

title: Array Methods - reduce()
description: Understanding reduce() method for accumulating values and real-world use cases like shopping cart.

title: DOM Manipulation - Part 1
description: Understanding Document Object Model, selectors, and basic DOM manipulation in JavaScript.

title: DOM Manipulation - Part 2
description: Parent-Child Traversal, Siblings, childNodes, and Deep DOM Navigation.

title: DOM Manipulation - Part 3
description: Creating Elements, Adding Attributes, Text Nodes, and Appending to DOM.

title: DOM Manipulation - Part 4
description: Adding, Editing, Replacing, and Removing Elements dynamically in the DOM.

title: Events in JavaScript - Part 1
description: Understanding addEventListener, Event Bubbling, preventDefault, and Event Delegation.

title: Events & Timing in JavaScript - Part 2
description: Working with setTimeout, clearTimeout, and asynchronous execution.

title: API Requests with XMLHttpRequest
description: Understanding XMLHttpRequest, ready states, and making GET requests to APIs.

title: Promises & Async/Await
description: Master Promises, chaining, error handling, async/await and modern asynchronous JavaScript.
